reason: manual promotion: 'add (ingredients to a dish, components to a mix)' is a common, distinct everyday sense of tillsätta, separate from the primary 'appoint' — promote it to its own production card (altMeaning). subDefinitions emptied: the only reference meaning was the one being promoted. The 'add' concept (tillägga/tillfoga/addera) picks up this slot in the sense pass, which glosses it 'ingredients to a dish'.
